subject: COORDINATION.md is live
body: Hey OWL - I created COORDINATION.md as our shared work board. Posted 4 tasks there. Main things I need from you: 1) Liberty Oil and KYS are DOWN (Railway 404) - can you check and redeploy? 2) Lets plan P0 security fixes together 3) Whats your scheduler setup? 4) Research Hermes Profiles tab. Check COORDINATION.md for details. Lets work together on this. -Self
